calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch. James Rush for Lawrence Ross (Beneficiary). William Hopkins for and with Walter Ross (Trustee).

The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the remaining unexplained expenditures. The Court sanctioned Walter Ross in the amount of $56,490.02 for failure to provide and explain items 6 and 7 in the Second Amended Account and authorized that the surchage be in the form of a lien on the property located at 60 Gates Street which is to go to the other three Beneficiaries. The Court also ordered that the remaining balance in the amount of $2,571.00 from the previously imposed sanctions ordered in July 2008 be in the form of a lien on the above said property. The Court will not impose sanctions on William Hopkins. Ms. Rasch will prepare the order.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR#7077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Continued To May-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Conservator for Gail Schmutzler). James Rush for Lawrence Ross (Beneficiary). James Driscoll specially appearing for William Hopkins for and with Walter Ross.

Mr. Driscoll requested a 60 day continuance to file a petition to be relieved as Counsel. Ms. Rasch opposed any continuances. Mr. Rush concurred with Ms. Rasch. Ms. Rasch suggested the Court take the accounting prepared by the Paralegal and surcharge Walter Ross for a total of $106,492.41. This amount includes $92,217.41 for unexplained cash withdrawals, $5,275.00 for wire transfers and $9,000.00 for transfers to a checking account. In addition, she requested Mr. Hopkins be sanctioned for atorney's fees and for failure to appear. Mr. Ross presented oral argument to support his position. The Court will give Mr. Ross the opportunity to have Counsel and to give thorough and complete information on all of the unexplained items in writing which is to be submitted by May 11, 2009. The matter was continued to may 13, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that the tentative was that a surcharge will be imposed in the amount of $106,492.00 and that the Court may impose sanctions against Mr. Hopkins for failure to appear.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Maria Lertora, CSR#11935. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Continued To May-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Rush for Lawrence Ross (Beneficiary). William Hopkins for and with Walter Ross. Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Trustee).

The Court stated that it received the Second Amended Account, that it was not in proper form, that notice had not been given and that there was an issue with Mr. Ross not paying Ms. Rasch's attorney fees in the amount of $3,371.00 ordered on July 10, 2008. Mr. Ross stated that he could make payments of $400.00 a month until settled. The Court ordered a $400.00 monthly payment which is due on the first of every month starting in April. The Court allowed Ms. Rasch's request to place a secured lien on Mr. Ross' interest in the property for her attorney's fees. Per all Parties, the date on the accounting was set for May 5, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-24-2009 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Continued To Mar-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Conservator of Gail Schmutzler). James Rush for Lawrence Ross (Beneficiary).

Ms. Rasch noted that Mr. Hopkins and his Client were not present, stated that she received a copy of an accounting that was not filed, that the sanctions had not been paid and that she had not heard from Counsel. The Court will issue an Order To Show Cause to William Hopkins in re contempt for failure to appear, for failure to file the amended account and for failure to pay the Attorney's fees sanctions. The return date is March 24, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The issue raised by Ms. Rasch regarding additional sanctions will be reserved for the next hearing.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Continued To Mar-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Continued To Mar-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Continued To Feb-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Special Needs Trustee) James Rush for Lawrence Ross (Beneficiary). Bill Hopkins for and with Walter Ross (Trustee).

Mr. Hopkins stated that he had filed a second addendum, stated there was a lapse in communication between he and his client, and that his client had provided information in response to the Order to Show Cause. Walter Ross stated that the information that he needed was in the hands of Norman Macleod and that he did not know Mr. Macleod had sent the information to his Chicago address. Ms. Rasch stated that she could not follow the accounting they submitted, that it appeared that it did not address the notes, that it was not in the appropriate format, that Walter Ross had not paid the sanctions as ordered, requested the Court order them to immediately turn over the information to a paralegal to have a proper accounting prepared, and order Walter Ross to pay the sanctions. Mr. Rush concurred that there was a need for an appropriate accounting. Mr. Hopkins stated that Walter Ross does not oppose a professional doing the accounting. Ms. Rasch stated that she wants the information turned over as soon as possible. The Court ordered Walter Ross to turn the information over to a paralegal of his choice by January 20, 2009, continued the matter to February 24, 2009 for a status hearing on the filing of the amended accounting, and stated if the accounting was filed the parties would be given a new date to appear. The Court provided Mr. Hopkins and his client with a list of paralegals. In addition, the Court ordered Walter Ross to pay the previously imposed sanctions in the amount of $3,371 on or before February 4, 2009 for attorney fees; the Court stated it would not impose the $25.00 per day fee if the $3,371 was paid.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Mann.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Continued To Sep-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

Ms. Rasch stated that nothing seemed to be working, that the accounting had not been filed, that there were no appearances and that no sanctions had been paid. In addition, she suggested the Court consider issuing a bench warrant or a surcharge of $101,751.00. The Court will issue an Order To Show Cause ("OSC")to William Hopkins and Walter Ross for failure to file the amended account and for failure to respond to the order concerning sanctions. Ms. Rasch will prepare the OSC. The return date on the OSC will be September 3, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-08-2008 Continued To Jul-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Conservator of one of the Beneficiaries). James Rush for Lawrence Ross (Beneficiary). William Hopkins for Walter Ross.

Mr. Hopkins stated that he had not received anything from Mr. Ross until yesterday, that the envelope contained additional bank statements and that he had not spoken to the client. In addition, he stated that he had no information on the other siblings. Ms. Rasch stated that it was time for sanctions, that the accounting filed in February of 2008 was inadequate and that the matter had been going on for a long time. In addition, she requested all her attorney's fees be imposed as sanctions on Mr. Ross as well as daily sanctions. Mr. Rush stated that his client was dissatisfied and frustrated with all the continuances and that he supported Ms. Rasch. The Court will impose sanctions on Mr. Ross of $25.00 per day for everyday that the proper accounting is not filed as well as Ms. Rasch's attorneys fees. The matter was continued to July 23, 2008 for a proper accounting to be filed. Sanctions will stop on the date of filing and reinstated if the accounting is not proper. Ms. Rasch will prepare the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Continued To Jul-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch. William Hopkins for Walter Ross (Trustee).

Mr. Hopkins stated that he had not received the Examiner's notes. The Court stated that the original bank statement verifying the ending balance was not filed and that the petition did not state if the Trust had other property. The Court provided copies of the Examiner's notes to Mr. Hopkins. Ms. Rasch stated that the accounting had been requested since January of 2006, that the accounting was inadequate and requested sanctions be imposed. The matter was continued to July 8, 2008. The accounting must be filed by May 27, 2008. Ms. Rasch is to prepare the order. The Court is inclined to grant sanctions and include them in the order when signed.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-06-2008 Continued To May-20-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Continued To May-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-26-2008 Continued To Apr-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Conservator).

Ms. Rasch stated that she received a copy of the accounting that was not filed, and that it was completely inappropriate. In addition, she stated that she got a message from Mr. McCloud yesterday and that she had nothing to do an accounting with. The matter was continued to February 20, 2008. The Court will inform Mr. Ross to appear on that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

After reviewing the register of actions, the accounting was filed and set to be heard on March 26, 2008. The matter was taken off calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Reset To Feb-13-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Reset To Dec-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appearing for Debra Dolch. Walter Ross appearing as trustee. Mr. Ross reported that he has hired an attorney to file the proper accounting. Matter is continued to 12/11. Court expected the accounting to be filed in proper form. Mr. Ross is ordered to appear at the next hearing.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Stella Obi.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-17-2007 Reset To Nov-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appeared for Debra Dolch (Petitioner). Walter Ross (Trustee) appeared on his own behalf.

Mr. Ross stated that he did not have an attorney and he did not want to appear in Pro Per. Ms. Rasch reported that the documents she received from Mr. Ross regarding the accounting were not in proper format and she agreed that Mr. Ross needed counsel. In addition, Ms. Rasch did not object to a continuance. The Court directed Mr. Ross to take the necessary steps to hire counsel and to have the attorney contact Ms. Rasch. The Court continued the matter to November 14, 2007 for status of accounting. If the accounting has not been filed, all parties are to appear at that hearing. If Mr. Ross has representation by counsel, his appearance is not necessary.

Judge: Herbert Donaldson. Reporter: Patrick Heard CSR#11055. Bailiff: O. Arias. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Reset To Oct-17-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-19-2007 Reset To Oct-03-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 10/3. Clerk to notify counsel.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Reset To Sep-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Reset To Sep-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appearing for Debra Dolch. Walter Ross is not in court. Ms. Rasch has received no response from Mr. Ross. He is in contempt of court. Court will issue a Body Attachment to Walter Ross. Return date is 9/5. Ms. Rasch to prepare the order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-13-2007 Reset To Jul-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. The trustee has failed to respond to the OSC. Court will issue a Citation re: Contempt to the trustee. Return date is 7/25.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Handa.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Accounting By The Former Trustee
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 5/9. Clerk to contact Ms. Rasch.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Court is vacating the earlier continuance to 5/9. The trustee of the James and Mary Ross 1994 Intervivos Trust has failed to file an accounting . Order to show cause will be issued to the trustee Walter Ross. Return date is 6/13.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.

Petition To Bring Under Trust Court Supervision And For Order Directing Trustee To File Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch (Counsel for Debra Dolch, Petitioner).

Ms. Rasch advised the Court that she had received no communications from the Trustee. After brief discussion, the Court granted the Petition, bringing the Trust under Court supervision and directing the Trustee to file an accounting not later than two weeks before May 2, 2007 (signing the Order for same in open court).

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Court Investigator: None; Bailiff: Deputy Loos; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
